title: Creamy Spicy Peruvian Chicken Thighs Stew
description: A spicy and flavorful one-pot stew featuring chicken thighs in a creamy Peruvian sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is gluten-free-friendly and can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped aji amarillo peppers and cook for 1 minute, until slightly softened.
Add the heavy cream, chicken broth, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 25 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
